name: Apocalypse Merge
author: Poki
description: Apocalypse Merge is a strategy merge game where you merge together all kinds of troops to fight in this apocalyptic war-zone. Select, merge, and deploy your perfect team of high-power warriors to make it to the far edge of the world. Defeat wave after wave of enemies, and unlock new and even stronger types of soldiers. Can your team beat them all? How to play Apocalypse Merge? Drag the creatures to the grid to claim them, and to each other to merge. Once you have the ally you want, drag them to the battlefield and watch them fight! Who created Apocalypse Merge? Apocalypse Merge is created by ParaTataTeam. This is their first game on the platform! How can I play Apocalypse Merge for free? You can play Apocalypse Merge for free on Poki. Can I play Apocalypse Merge on mobile devices and desktop? Apocalypse Merge can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
